//: Config-as-code for the E9 off-site backup service (keepou-backups). This service's Root Directory is the repo root, so Railway reads THIS file; keepou-api and keepou-web have their own root dirs (api/, web/) and read api/railway.json / web/railway.json, so they are unaffected. See docs/RUNBOOK-backups-restore.md and ops/backup/.
